Caption: Cell geometry and indentation. (a) Schematic view of the cell indentation; (b) top view of the pristine cell; (c) Mesh used for numerical simulation; (d) side view of the jellystack (after cutting). Note that the copper and aluminum foil appear thicker due to cutting artifacts.

Experimental set-up for slow and intermediate indentations with temperature control: (a) Interior of the testing chamber with ① cell with thermocouple and voltage monitoring, ② base plate and ③ indenter with ④ water glycol circulation. (b) Exterior of the box with ⑤ temperature-controlled extension, ⑥ cable passage for thermocouple and voltage measurement. ⑦ high speed camera. (c) Gas cleaning device with fan and activated charcoal tank.
